label: Flesh type
description: Defines the wound overlays, organic status, corpse category, and damage effecter for a category of creature flesh such as Normal, Mechanoid, or Insectoid.

ateDirect.label: Ate direct
ateDirect.description: Thought fired when a pawn eats raw meat or flesh of this type directly.

ateAsIngredient.label: Ate as ingredient
ateAsIngredient.description: Thought fired when a pawn eats a meal cooked with this flesh type as an ingredient.

corpseCategory.label: Corpse category
corpseCategory.description: ThingCategoryDef that determines which loot category corpses of this flesh type belong to.

damageEffecter.label: Damage effecter
damageEffecter.description: Visual effecter played when a creature of this flesh type takes damage.

isOrganic.label: Is organic
isOrganic.description: Whether this flesh type is organic. Drives bleeding, wound rendering, and organic-flesh-specific gameplay. Defaults to true.

genericWounds.label: Generic wounds
genericWounds.description: Wound overlays rendered for standard injuries on pawns of this flesh type.

bandagedWounds.label: Bandaged wounds
bandagedWounds.description: Wound overlays rendered when an injury on a pawn of this flesh type has been tended.

hediffWounds.label: Hediff wounds
hediffWounds.description: Wound overlay groups tied to specific hediffs (such as scarification or missing body parts) that replace the generic wound overlays when present.
